title: TrackResponse
description: A track response from the OpenSky Network REST API representing the trajectory of an aircraft as a sequence of waypoints.

icao24.description: Unique ICAO 24-bit address of the transponder in lower-case hex string representation.

startTime.description: Time of the first waypoint in Unix time (seconds since epoch).

endTime.description: Time of the last waypoint in Unix time (seconds since epoch).

callsign.description: Callsign of the aircraft. Can be null.

path.description: Array of waypoints ordered by time. Each waypoint is an array with 6 indexed fields.

Waypoint.title: Waypoint
Waypoint.description: A single waypoint in an aircraft track with 6 indexed fields: [time, latitude, longitude, baro_altitude, true_track, on_ground].

prefixItems.title: true_track
prefixItems.description: True track in decimal degrees clockwise from north.

prefixItems.title: on_ground
prefixItems.description: Boolean indicating if the aircraft is on the ground at this waypoint.
